title: Korean Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy Korean-inspired stir fry recipe made with spaghetti and a variety of vegetables. This dish is low in sodium and can be customized to your taste.

ingredients.name: chewy vegetables (such as carrots, bell peppers, and onions)
floral sauce (such as gochujang or Korean chili paste)

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped vegetables and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes, or until they are tender.
Add the spaghetti to the skillet and stir-fry for another 2-3 minutes, or until it is well coated with the vegetables and sauce.
In a small bowl, whisk together the floral sauce, korean chili flakes, and stir-fry seasonings.
Pour the sauce over the spaghetti and vegetables, and stir-fry for another minute, or until everything is well coated.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped green onions if desired.
